results.title: ‘Airport, rail factory, jobs and tourism’: Adhir seeks PM’s help for Murshidabad
results.description: “I have repeatedly raised in the Lok Sabha the urgent necessity of establishing an airport in Murshidabad,” he said, adding that enhanced connectivity will increase trade, tourism, and investment opportunities in the district and neighbouring areas.

results.title: Scindia unveils ₹189.79 | DD News
results.description: The Union Minister for Development of North Eastern Region (MDoNER), Jyotiraditya Scindia, on Wednesday launched the ₹189.79-crore Mizoram Ginger Mission, a major initiative aimed at transforming the state’s GI-certified pharma-grade ginger into a globally recognised premium product through value addition, processing and export-led market integration. results.title: Who is Aysia Collins? D4vd’s alleged girlfriend breaks silence Celeste Rivas theories intensify
results.description: Aysia Collins, a California-based influencer allegedly linked to D4vd, has become a major topic in online discussions surrounding the Celeste Rivas case. Viral screenshots, livestream clips, and fan theories pushed her name across social media platforms. Collins later addressed the rumours in a Reddit post, claiming she was “no longer friends with David” and wanted “justice for Celeste Rivas.” Despite growing speculation, there is currently no public evidence showing Collins has been charged or formally accused.
creator: barsha dutta
